## writing-style
- No em-dashes.
- Natural human voice.
- Roy Lee energy: direct, brash, confident — adapted for HS junior.
- No fabricated metrics or invented numbers.

## preferences
- Workout plans: per-set load + reps, explicit lb/kg, printable format.
- Weekly planning: bullet-only daily checklists, no times in task items.
- Learning mode: interactive guided sessions, not autonomously delivered content.
- Spatial content: scaffold with cardinal orientation, not turn-by-turn.
